zh.lifeSummary: 當Etiennette de Barcelona於1118年出生在法國時，她的父親Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona38歲，母親Douce de Gévaudan32歲。她於1130年與Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax在法國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1165年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Etiennette de Barcelona于1118年出生在法国时，她的父亲Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona38岁，母亲Douce de Gévaudan32岁。她于1130年与Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax在法国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1165年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Barcelona
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Amelita, Elvira, Jaime, Luis, Manuel, Mariano, Orlando, Ramon, Romelia.

Catalan and Spanish: habitational name from Barcelona, the principal city of Catalonia. The placename is of uncertain, certainly pre-Roman, origin. The settlement was established by the Carthaginians, and according to tradition it was named for the Carthaginian ruling house of Barca; the Latin form was Barcino or Barcilo.

variants.name: Barcelo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Carlos, Mario, Francisco, Juan, Ruben, Arturo, Eduardo, Humberto, Ignacio, Jaime.
Catalan (Barceló): apparently from the Latin personal name Barcelonus, a male equivalent of Barcelona, originally denoting someone from the city of Barcelona (see Barcelona ).

nameMeanings.name: Etiennette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of Étienne , with the diminutive suffix -ette.

en.lifeSummary: When Etiennette de Barcelona was born in 1118, in France, her father, Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona, was 38 and her mother, Douce de Gévaudan, was 32. She married Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax in 1130, in France. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1165, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Etiennette de Barcelona est née en 1118, à France, son père, Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Douce de Gévaudan, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax en 1130, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1165, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Etiennette de Barcelona 1118 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona 38 und ihre Mutter Douce de Gévaudan 32. Sie hat 1130 in Frankreich Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1165 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Etiennette de Barcelona è nata il nel 1118 nel Francia, sua padre, Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Douce de Gévaudan, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax nel 1130, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1165, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Etiennette de Barcelonaが1118年にフランスで生まれた時，父Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelonaは38歳，母Douce de Gévaudanは32歳であった。1130年にフランスでVicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Daxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1165年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Etiennette de Barcelona(이)가 1118년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Douce de Gévaudan(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1130년 프랑스에서 Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Etiennette de Barcelona nasceu em 1118, em França, seu pai, Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Douce de Gévaudan, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax em 1130, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1165, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Etiennette de Barcelona родилась в 1118 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Douce de Gévaudan, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax в 1130 г. в местности Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1165 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Etiennette de Barcelona nació en 1118, en Francia, su papá, Raymond Bérenger III de Barcelona, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Douce de Gévaudan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Vicomte Raymond Arnaud II de Dax Vicomte de Dax en 1130, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1165, a la edad de 47 años.
